name: pr-in-the-loop
description: GitHub issue-to-PR development workflow skills modeled on Superpowers and recent user work patterns.

interface.shortDescription: Human-in-the-loop Issue, PR planning, implementation, review, and PR message workflows for Codex.
interface.longDescription: PR In The Loop packages a Superpowers-aligned development process: create an issue, write and human-review a PR plan, convert the approved plan into an implementation spec, delegate file-scoped implementation with fresh subagents, run typed parallel code review into an HTML report, and draft a Korean PR message.
